blocker_summary: PHASE_5_PAYMENT_INTEGRATION cannot start safely because no concrete payment provider, webhook/signature verification contract, or deployment configuration exists in the repository.
phase_gate_notes: Do not rename existing route names.
Required safe branch is active and local protected base branch is `master` in this repository.
Phase 4 began from handoff checkpoint `8f6e3ef07ff9092ea7eb9c3169de5f277b2de4c7` after the Phase 3 donor portal metadata checkpoint.

Phase 4 delivered an additive `/management/reporting` surface with source-wise inflow separation, fee-vs-donation visibility, invoice status summaries, and receipt visibility without touching legacy report routes.
Legacy transaction controllers, legacy report controllers/views, shared management navigation, dashboard totals, and historical migrations were left untouched during Phase 4.
The broader suite still reproduces only the 14 documented auth/profile baseline failures.
PHASE_5_PAYMENT_INTEGRATION is blocked until a concrete payment provider, webhook/signature verification model, and deployment configuration contract are supplied.
